title: Rudy Sanchez scholarships list (4/9/21)
html:
TL;DR

  • A bare links-list of five April–May 2021 scholarship deadlines — Rover.com, Sebring Design Build, Slickdeals/TUN, Digital Responsibility e-waste, Shawn Carter Foundation.
  • Each entry has a deadline tag (4/26, 4/30, 5/1, 5/31) but no essay drafts — Yahir is in scout-mode, not writer-mode.
  • Rover scholarship prompt explicitly noted: "How has technology impacted the person you are today?" — same prompt-shape that recurs in his Why OSU essay drafts.
  • The list belongs to the 2021 scholarship grind cluster — pre-OSU enrollment, post-FHS-final period.
  • Source title attribution to "Rudy Sanchez" is unexplained — likely a friend or counselor who shared the list. First-name only; queue if it recurs.

Notes

Pure scaffolding doc. Five hyperlinks + deadline annotations + the Rover prompt copy-pasted in. Useful as a date-stamp for when Yahir was actively shopping scholarships (week of April 9, 2021). The Shawn Carter Foundation appearance is notable — connects to the Other Wes Moore / first gen college thread he wrote about three months earlier in the FHS final. Per user "skip scholarship essays" rule this is a brief stub-summary only.

Connections

  • scholarship grind 2021 · college admissions · first generation guilt
  • 2021 04 19 why osu · 2021 01 12 fhs final
  • shawn carter foundation
